qa_pairs.question: Which things have a service type code of Cleanning but a service details status of Unsatisfied?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
WHERE things.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Cleanning'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which things entities with service details equal to 'Unsatisfied' and service type code equal to 'Cleanning'?

qa_pairs.question: Which things have service_details that are exactly Satisfied?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied'

qa_pairs.question: Which things with service type Check and service details Satisfied have an open status on or before 2016-11-14 17:30:51 and were at location 854 Keeling Sho on or before 2017-10-21 04:21:54?

JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_status_of_things.status_of_thing_code = 'Open' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_status_of_things.date_and_date <= '2016-11-14 17:30:51' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time <= '2017-10-21 04:21:54' AND timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '854 Keeling Sho' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check'
